advisory.title: Sandbox escape via TOCTOU race in remote FS bridge readFile
advisory.description:
## Summary

Sandbox escape via TOCTOU race in remote FS bridge readFile.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix

Fixed by commit `121870a08583033ed6a0ed73d9ffea32991252bb` (`fix(sandbox): pin remote fs bridge reads`).

introducingCommits.subject: fix(host-env): block Python package index redirection env vars (#58011)

timeline.notes: This case uses the immediate parent of fix commit 121870a08583033ed6a0ed73d9ffea32991252bb as the last known vulnerable snapshot. Exact introduction commit mapping is still pending.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should detect sandboxescape when scanning vulnerableHead. This case uses the last known vulnerable pre-fix commit pending exact introduction mapping.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_is_fix_parent
checks.details: Using parent 7ae1bb0c7799fd0cbd2d4de7b0f5b8039837ab8d of fix commit 121870a08583033ed6a0ed73d9ffea32991252bb as the last known vulnerable commit.

checks.name: baseline_precedes_vulnerable_head
checks.details: Using direct parent 873549c8f17be434fb8903c563f752a62c6d3a0c of vulnerableHead 7ae1bb0c7799fd0cbd2d4de7b0f5b8039837ab8d as a temporary baseline until exact introduction mapping is completed.
